info.name: Apartment Management System API
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the **Apartment Management System** Azure Functions API.

## Quick Start
1. Import this collection and the accompanying environment file.
2. Select the `AMS – Local Dev` environment.
3. Run **Auth → Login** to populate `bearerToken` automatically.
4. All subsequent requests use `{{bearerToken}}` and `{{societyId}}` from the environment.

## Modules
Auth · Society · Apartments · Users/Residents · Amenities · Amenity Bookings · Complaints · Notices · Visitor Log · Fee Schedules · Fee Payments · Gamification · Service Providers

item.name: 01 – Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints: OTP flow and direct login.
